title: ts#agent
description: Add an AI Agent to a TypeScript project

project.description: The project to add the Agent to
project.x-prompt: Select the TypeScript project to add the Agent to

sdk.x-prompt: Which agent SDK would you like to use?

name.description: The name of your Agent (default: agent)
name.x-prompt: What would you like to call your Agent? (default: agent)

auth.description: The method used to authenticate with your Agent. Only applicable when infra is set (ignored when infra is none).
auth.x-prompt: How would you like to authenticate with your Agent?

protocol.description: The server protocol for your Agent. HTTP exposes a tRPC/WebSocket server. A2A exposes an Agent-to-Agent protocol server. AG-UI exposes an AG-UI protocol server for direct frontend integration with CopilotKit.
protocol.x-prompt: Which protocol would you like to use for your Agent?

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)

infra.description: The type of infrastructure to host your Agent.
infra.x-prompt: How would you like to host your Agent server?
